# americancloud_network_acl_rule (Resource)

A rule in a `americancloud_network_acl` list. Rules are evaluated in ascending `number` order; the first match wins. Immutable — any change replaces the rule. Deleting the parent ACL list deletes its rules.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "americancloud_vpc_network" "main" {
  name   = "main-vpc"
  region = "us-west-0"
  cidr   = "10.10.0.0/16"
}

resource "americancloud_network_acl" "web_tier" {
  name   = "web-tier-acl"
  vpc_id = americancloud_vpc_network.main.id
}

# Rules evaluate in ascending number order; first match wins.
resource "americancloud_network_acl_rule" "allow_https" {
  acl_id       = americancloud_network_acl.web_tier.id
  number       = 10
  protocol     = "TCP"
  cidr_list    = "0.0.0.0/0"
  action       = "Allow"
  traffic_type = "Ingress"
  start_port   = 443
  end_port     = 443
}

resource "americancloud_network_acl_rule" "deny_rest" {
  acl_id       = americancloud_network_acl.web_tier.id
  number       = 100
  protocol     = "ALL"
  cidr_list    = "0.0.0.0/0"
  action       = "Deny"
  traffic_type = "Ingress"
}

# Attach the ACL to a tier.
resource "americancloud_vpc_tier" "web" {
  vpc_id  = americancloud_vpc_network.main.id
  name    = "web"
  gateway = "10.10.1.1"
  netmask = "255.255.255.0"
  acl_id  = americancloud_network_acl.web_tier.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `acl_id` (String) ACL list identifier (from `americancloud_network_acl`) the rule belongs to.
- `action` (String) Whether matching traffic is allowed: Allow or Deny.
- `cidr_list` (String) CIDR the rule applies to, e.g. `0.0.0.0/0`.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol: one of TCP, UDP, ICMP, ALL.
- `traffic_type` (String) Direction the rule applies to: Ingress or Egress.

### Optional

- `end_port` (Number) End of the port range (1–65535). Used for TCP/UDP.
- `icmp_code` (Number) ICMP message code. Used for the ICMP protocol.
- `icmp_type` (Number) ICMP message type. Used for the ICMP protocol.
- `number` (Number) Rule number (1–1000). Unique within the list; determines evaluation order. Assigned by the platform when omitted.
- `start_port` (Number) Start of the port range (1–65535). Used for TCP/UDP.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Rule identifier (UUID).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import americancloud_network_acl_rule.allow_https "b42e1d21-f3c5-4e1f-99ea-9cdf8c26cbf3"
```
